criteria.method: TwitchTracker top-700 Spanish-language streamers (15 pages), filtered by lastGame=Counter-Strike via Twitch GQL inline query. LATAM filter: email TLD .ar/.uy, city/country mentions, name analysis (Argentine surnames), absence of Spain markers (LVP, KOI, Gentlemates, Valladolid, vosotros)

filtered_creators.notes: Argentine CS2 streamer — IG linked: nahueevazquez (Nahuel Vázquez, Argentine name)
Argentine CS2 streamer — 'CS por donde mires', Creador de Contenido @AuroraGaming, Bell Ville - Córdoba (confirmed via IG luchoforg1 bio)
Argentine CS2 streamer — safiro@doxen.com.ar (.ar = Argentina domain)
Argentine ex-professional CS player & streamer — 'El Morocho' (Argentine nickname)
Argentine CS2 streamer — full name: Ignacio Agustín Grosso (Italian-origin Argentine surname), 69K IG followers
Argentine CS2 streamer — nicolas.maravilla@gmail.com ('Maravilla' = iconic Argentine boxing reference: Sergio 'Maravilla' Martínez)
Argentine CS2 streamer & YouTuber — confirmed LATAM via YouTube @branuelcs and IG branuelcs (60.9K)
Likely Argentine CS2 streamer — 'Me llamo Maxi', no Spain markers found. 'Maxi' is common Argentine diminutive.

excluded_spain.reason: Spain — competed in LVP (Liga de Videojuegos Profesional, Spain)
Spain — FlipiN, Spanish ex-pro player, 'Counter-Strike como forma de vida'
Spain — caster/analyst for KOI and M8 (Spain esports orgs)
Spain — Instagram bio: 'Valladolid' (city in Castile, Spain)

excluded_uncertain.reason: Origin unverified — no location info found in any profile
Origin ambiguous — 'Hector Fernandez Jimenez' is neutral Spanish name
Bilingual Spanish/Portuguese, small channel — origin unclear

notes: 700 Spanish-language streamers from TwitchTracker top 15 pages (ranked by avg viewers Apr 2026). LATAM Twitch CS2 scene dominated by Argentina (7/8 confirmed). No significant CS2 streamers found from Mexico, Colombia, Chile, Peru in this dataset.
